# thoth_policy_change_artifacts (Data Source)

Lists policy change artifacts with optional environment filter.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thoth_policy_change_artifacts" "prod" {
  target_environment = "prod"
  limit              = 50
  offset             = 0
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Max records to return.
- `offset` (Number) Pagination offset.
- `target_environment` (String) Filter artifacts by target environment.

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Policy change artifacts as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total matching artifacts.
